subject: Unfezant, a large bird Pokemon in soaring flight with distinctive head plumage
description: A large bird Pokemon soars against an open blue sky, wings spread wide in confident flight. The creature has a prominent head ornament — a curved plume extending back from the head — and its underside shows lighter coloring against darker wing surfaces. The body suggests a hawk or pheasant-like silhouette. The wide-open sky framing and wing spread give the image a feeling of freedom and speed. The overall palette is earthy browns and grays on the bird against a clean blue sky.
foreground: Large bird with spread wings and curved head plume in flight
